title: 01841_Fast_Inference_from_Transformers_via_Speculative_Decoding
positive_examples: The method can accelerate existing off-the-shelf models without retraining or architecture changes, leading to faster inference times for applications such as translation and summarization.
Demonstrated a 2X-3X acceleration in inference speed for large autoregressive models, which can improve user experience in real-time applications.
The approach is easy to implement in production settings, making advanced AI capabilities more accessible.
